/usr/bin/g++  -std=c++11 -O3 -DNDEBUG -L/home/yzhou/.local/lib -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/call_highs_from_cpp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/call_highs_from_cpp.dir/call_highs_from_cpp.cpp.o -o ../bin/call_highs_from_cpp  -Wl,-rpath,/home/yzhou/Github/HiGHS/build_release/lib ../lib/libhighs.so.1.13.1 -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/yzhou/Github/HiGHS/build_release/lib
